title: 140 Pcs Small Mini Glass Bottles Jars with Cork Stoppers Wishing Bottle Potion Bottles Spell Jars Apothecary Bottles Glass Vials with Corks Decorative Bottles Drifting Bottle for Wedding DIY, Mixed
description:
About this item
Sufficient and Diverse: there are 140 pieces of small glass bottles with cork, in 14 various shaped styles, such as star, inclined heart, chili, water drop, square, single pointed, heart, sphere, flask, 10 pieces for each style; The abundant quantity and attractive styles can meet your various demands; Please note that Individual breakages may also occur during the long transit, even if protective measures have been taken
Versatile Usage: the glass bottles with cork have dependable sealing performance and love shapes, and you can fill them with various things, like delicate beads, seed, sand, petals, spice, small trinkets, essential oil, perfume, candies, to make them beautiful ornaments for decorating your family, hotel, bar, party, cafe, restaurants, or to make them reliable storage containers for conveniently carrying
Reliable and Clear Material: the spell bottles are made of quality high borosilicate glass material, which features the high transparency, smooth surface, sturdy texture, allowing the bottles ideal for various usage, like DIY crafting; Unless they fall from a great height, there is no need of worrying about breaking
Make a Wish: you can invite your friends, relatives, neighbors, coworkers to write down their wishes toward life, career, love, and more, then roll the paper up and insert it into the tiny glass bottles, waiting and hoping these wishes come true, which is a suitable and popular activity for birthday, wedding, Christmas, Thanksgiving, and housewarming gathering
DIY a Present: the shaped glass bottles can be applied to various DIY project, making the most of your design talent and creativity; And you can send your handmade present that is filled with your endless love to your loved ones, which will move them and make them happy

reviews_5s: These are tiny and perfect, and I received extra corks. The glass is fairly thick and not super fragile. Out of 140 bottles only one had a chipped rim so it's clear they were handled carefully.Came well packaged and in good shape. Excellent for anyone who needs small vials.I bought these for a magical themed sleepover. The girls spent a lot of time making "potions" by filling these bottles with glitter. It was a big hit.I haven't had time to ope the box yet but I order the corked jars all the time so I know they'll be great
